meta.title: Ritik Pawar — Full-Stack Developer
meta.description: Full-Stack Developer with 4+ years of experience building scalable applications with React.js, Node.js, and TypeScript. Specializing in microservices architecture, cloud deployments, and performance optimization.

hero.name: Ritik Pawar.
hero.title: Full-Stack Developer.
hero.tagline: 4+ years crafting scalable full-stack applications — from microservices and cloud infrastructure to polished user interfaces. I turn complex systems into elegant, high-performance products.

about.bio: Based in Bengaluru, India, I am a Full-Stack Developer with 4+ years of hands-on experience engineering scalable products across billing, healthcare, education, and fintech domains. I specialize in bridging robust backend systems with intuitive frontends — always optimizing for performance, security, and developer experience. I've led teams, architected microservices, and shipped features used by thousands of real users.

timeline.description: Architected scalable REST APIs and full-stack applications for billing, rental, and wallet systems. Deployed and managed infrastructure on AWS (EC2, S3), implemented CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, and optimized performance through lazy loading and caching — reducing load time by 30% and API latency by 20%. Enforced authentication and authorization using JWT and OAuth across all services.

Built and maintained education, e-commerce, and tender management platforms. Improved REST API performance by 30%, integrated payment gateways (Razorpay, Atom, Propay) and social auth (Google, Facebook). Managed MySQL databases with query optimization, and deployed on Linux/Apache. Mentored interns and improved team productivity by 25%.
Built a quiz application for Saar Education using CodeIgniter and jQuery. Conducted manual testing to improve software quality and user-facing reliability.

timeline.company: Millennium Institute of Technology and Science
timeline.description: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering. Graduated with a strong foundation in data structures, algorithms, distributed systems, and software engineering principles.
Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering. Developed foundational programming and systems knowledge that fueled early professional growth.

projects.title: Gasolina — Payment & Rewards Ecosystem
projects.description: A fuel payment platform built for South Africa, featuring wallet recharge, QR-based secure payments, loyalty programs, EMS sync, and real-time dashboards with multi-level user management.

projects.title: Coremax — Medical Billing & Clinic Management
projects.description: A comprehensive clinic management system with appointment scheduling, insurance management, secure role-based access, real-time alerts, analytics dashboards, and backend-driven reporting.

projects.title: Billabong High — School Management System
projects.description: Full school management platform covering academics, transport, and administration. Features real-time bus tracking, EMS modules, multi-role login (staff, students, parents), and live dashboards.

certifications.title: React — The Complete Guide 2023 (incl. React Router & Redux)

contact.headline: Let's work together
contact.subtext: Open to full-time roles, freelance projects, and technical consultation. Reach out if you have a product that needs a developer who cares about both quality and delivery.
